name: Syswork Co., Ltd
summary: Syswork Co., Ltd manufactures and sells clean room syatems, air conditioning systems, and ventilation control systems in South Korea. The company offers FFU/EFU monitoring control, volatile organic compound collection and emission control, chiller control, ventilation controller, and total heat exchanger control devices; BLDC motor controllers; and molding and processing services. The company was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in Daejeon, South Korea.
